name: Haibatullah Akhundzada
quote: The Islamic Emirate has established an Islamic system according to Islamic law. We will not allow anyone to interfere in Afghanistan's internal affairs.

name: Sirajuddin Haqqani
role: Afghan Minister of Interior / Haqqani Network Leader
quote: I am not a monster, I am a freedom fighter. I am on the FBI Most Wanted list, but I am also a government minister — figure that out.

name: Mullah Abdul Ghani Baradar
quote: We have reached what we were seeking — the expulsion of foreign forces and the establishment of an Islamic government.

name: Mullah Mohammad Hassan Akhund
quote: We call on the international community to engage with Afghanistan's new government in a constructive and respectful manner.

name: George W. Bush
role: US President (2001–2009) — Launched Operation Enduring Freedom
quote: Today, our fellow citizens, our way of life, our very freedom came under attack in a series of deliberate and deadly terrorist acts. These acts of mass murder were intended to frighten our nation into chaos and retreat. But they have failed. Our country is strong.

name: Barack Obama
quote: We did not ask for this fight. On September 11, 2001, nineteen men hijacked four airplanes and used them to murder nearly 3,000 people. And we will not relent until we win the fight they started.

name: Joe Biden
quote: I was not going to extend this forever war, and I was not going to extend a forever exit. The buck stops with me.

name: Hamid Karzai
quote: The United States treated us like a tool — useful when needed, discarded when not. We built a country together and they left it to burn.

name: Ashraf Ghani
role: Afghan President (2014–2021) — Fled During Taliban Takeover
quote: I left Afghanistan to prevent a bloodbath that would have cost thousands of lives. I did not want the blood of Kabul's people on my hands.

name: Gen. Stanley McChrystal
role: ISAF Commander (2009–2010) — Architect of COIN Strategy
quote: We must avoid the trap of winning tactical battles while losing the strategic war. Protecting the population is the mission, not killing the enemy.

name: Gen. David Petraeus
quote: Progress is fragile and reversible. But we have arrested the momentum of the Taliban in key areas, and we are starting to build it ourselves.

name: Imran Khan
quote: When you were trying to make peace with the Taliban, you were asking us to do more. Let me remind you: you cannot have peace in Afghanistan without Pakistan.

name: Gen. Pervez Musharraf
role: Pakistani President (2001–2008) — Key US Ally Post-9/11
quote: We are with you against terrorism, but we do what is in Pakistan's interest. If you threaten us, remember we are a nuclear power.

name: Shehbaz Sharif
role: Pakistani PM (2022–2024) — Escalated TTP Pressure on Taliban
quote: The Afghan Taliban must fulfill their commitment to not allow Afghan territory to be used for terrorist activities against Pakistan. We cannot tolerate TTP attacks indefinitely.

name: Zalmay Khalilzad
role: US Special Envoy for Afghan Reconciliation — Negotiated Doha Deal
quote: The Doha Agreement was the best achievable outcome given the circumstances. It provided a framework for peace that the parties chose not to fully implement.

name: Ahmad Massoud
quote: The West abandoned Afghanistan once in the 1990s and the world suffered on 9/11. Now they are abandoning us again — and this time we will suffer the consequences together.

name: Suhail Shaheen
quote: There is no specific timeframe for opening girls' schools above grade 6. We are working on a plan to implement this — it requires the right Islamic environment.

name: Ayman al-Zawahiri
role: Al-Qaeda Leader (2011–2022) — Killed in Kabul Drone Strike
quote: America is the biggest enemy of Muslims in the world today. It is the head of the snake, and it must be cut off for the umma to be free.

name: Bilawal Bhutto Zardari
quote: The international community must be clear: there will be no recognition, no legitimacy, and no economic integration for a government that bans women from education and work.

name: Richard Bennett
role: UN Special Rapporteur on Human Rights in Afghanistan
quote: The Taliban's systematic oppression of Afghan women and girls constitutes institutionalized discrimination and may amount to gender persecution as a crime against humanity under international law.

name: Adm. Mike Mullen
quote: The Haqqani Network acts as a veritable arm of Pakistan's Inter-Services Intelligence agency. With ISI support, Haqqani operatives planned and conducted the attack on the US Embassy.
